content: Dil Se Jo Baat Nikalti Hai, Asar Rakhti Hai / Par Nahin, Taaqat-e-Parwaaz Magar Rakhti Hai
Qudsi-Ul-Asal Hai, Riffat Pe Nazar Rakhti Hai / Khaak Se Uthti Hai, Gardoon Pe Guzar Rakhti Hai
Ishq Tha Fitna Gar-o-Sarkash-o-Chalaak Mera / Aasman Cheer Gaya Nala-e-Bebaak Mera
Peer-e-Gardoon Ne Kaha Sun Ke, Kahin Hai Koi! / Bole Sayyaare, Sar-e-Arsh-e-Bareen Hai Koi!
Chaand Kahta Tha, Nahin, Ahl-e-Zameen Hai Koi! / Kehkashaan Kehti Thi, Poshida Yahin Hai Koi!
Kuch Jo Samjha Tau Mere Shikwe Ko Rizwan Samjha / Mujhe Jannat Se Nikala Huwa Insan Samjha
Thi Farishton Ko Bhi Hairat, Ke Yeh Awaz Hai Kya! / Arsh Walon Pe Bhi Khulta Nahin Yeh Raaz Hai Kya!
Taa Sar-e-Arsh Bhi Insan Ki Tag-o-Taaz Hai Kya? / Aa Gyi Khak Ki Chutki Ko Bhi Parwaaz Hai Kya?
Ghafil Aadaab Se Yeh Sukkaan-e-Zameen Kaise Hain / Shokh-o-Gustakh Yeh Pasti Ke Makeen Kaise Hain!
Iss Qadar Shokh Ke Allah Se Bhi Barham Hai / Tha Jo Masjood-e-Malaeek Yeh Wohi Aadam Hai?
Alam-e-Kaif Hai, Dana-e-Ramooz-e-Kam Hai / Haan, Magar Ijz Ke Asrar Se Namehram Hai
Naaz Hai Taaqat-e-Guftaar Pe Insanon Ko / Baat Karne Ka Saliqa Nahin Nadanon Ko!
Ayi Aawaz Ghum-Angaiz Hai Afsana Tera / Ashk-e-Betaab Se Labraiz Hai Paimana Tera
Asmangeer Huwa Naara-e-Mastana Tera / Kis Qadar Shokh Zuban Hai Dil-e-Diwana Tera
Shukr Shikwe Ko Kiya Husn-e-Ada Se Tu Ne / Hum Sukhan Kar Diya Bandon Ko Khuda Se Tu Ne
Hum Tau Mayal Ba-Karam Hain, Koi Sayal Hi Nahin / Rah Dikhlaen Kise Rahraw-e-Manzil Hi Nahin
Tarbiat Aam Tau Hai, Jauhar-e-Qabil Hi Nahin / Jis Se Taamir Ho Aadam Ki Yeh Woh Gil Hi Nahin
Koi Qabil Ho Tau Hum Shan-e-Kai Dete Hain / Dhoondne Walon Ko Dunya Bhi Nai Dete Hain!
Hath Be-Zor Hain, Ilhaad Se Dil Khoo-Gar Hain / Ummati Baais-e-Ruswai-e-Paighamber (S.A.W) Hain
But-Shikan Uth Gaye, Baqi Jo Rahe But-Gar Hain / Tha Braheem Pidar, Aur Pisar Aazar Hain
Badah Aasham Naye, Bada Naya, Khum Bhi Naye / Harm-e-Kaaba Naya, But Bhi Naye, Tum Bhi Naye
Woh Bhi Din The Ke Yehi Maya-e-Raanai Tha / Nazish-e-Mousam-e-Gul Lala-e-Sahrai Tha!
Jo Musalmaan Tha Allah Ka Saudai Tha / Kabhi Mehboob Tumhara Yehi Harjai Tha
Kisi Yakjai Se Ab Ehd-e-Ghulami Kar Lo / Millat-e-Ahmad (S.A.W.) Ko Maqami Kar Lo!
Kis Qadar Tum Pe Garan Subah Ki Baidari Hai / Hum Se Kab Pyar Hai! Haan Neend Tumhain Pyari Hai
Tabaa-e-Azad Pe Qaid-e-Ramazan Bhari Hai / Tumhi Keh Do, Yehi Aaeen-e-Wafadari Hai?
Qoum Mazhab Se Hai, Mazhab Jo Nahin, Tum Bhi Nahin / Jazb-e-Baham Jo Nahin, Mehfil-e-Anjum Bhi Nahin
Jin Ko Ata Nahin Dunya Mein Koi Fann, Tum Ho / Nahin Jis Qoum Ko Parwaye Nasheman, Tum Ho
Bijliyan Jis Mein Hon Aasudah, Woh Khirman Tum Ho / Baich Khate Hain Jo Aslaaf Ke Madfan, Tum Ho
Ho Niko Naam Jo Qabaron Ki Tajarat Kar Ke / Kya Na Baicho Ge Jo Mil Jaen Sanam Pathar Ke
Kyun Ziyaan Kaar Banun, Sood Framosh Rahun / Fikr-e-Farda Na Karum, Mahw-e-Ghum-e-Dosh Rahun
Naale Bulbul Ke Sunoon, Aur Hama Tan Gosh Rahun / Humnawa Main Bhi Koi Gul Hun Ke Khamosh Rahun
Jurrat Aamoz Miri Taab-e-Sakhun Hai Mujh Ko / Shikwa Allah Se Khakam Badahan Hai Mujh Ko
Hai Baja Shewa-e-Tasleem Mein Mashoor Hain Hum / Qissa-e-Dard Sunate Hain Ke Majboor Hain Hum
Saaz-e-Khamosh Hain, Faryad Se Maamoor Hain Hum / Nala Ata Hai Agar Lab Pe To Maazoor Hain Hum
Ae Khuda Shikwa-e-Arbab-e-Wafa Bhi Sun Le / Khugar-e-Hamd Se Thora Sa Gila Bhi Sun Le
Thi To Maujood Azal Se Hi Teri Zaat-e-Qadim / Phool Tha Zaib-e-Chaman, Par Na Preshan Thi Shamim
Shart Insaaf Hai, Ae Sahib-e-Altaf-e-Amim / Boo-e-Gul Phailti Kis Tarah Jo Hoti Na Nasim
Hum Ko Jamiat-e-Khatir Ye Preshani Thi / Warna Ummat Tere Mehboob (S.A.W.) Ki Diwani Thi
Hum Se Pehle Tha Ajab Tere Jahan Ka Manzar / Kahin Masjood The Pathar, Kahin Maabood Shajar
Khugar-e-Paikar-e-Mahsoos Thi Insaan Ki Nazar / Manta Phir Koi Un-Dekhe Khuda Ko Kyunkar
Tujh Ko Maalum Hai Leta Tha Koi Naam Tera? / Quwwat-e-Baazoo-e-Muslim Ne Kiya Kaam Tera
Bas Rahe The Yahin Saljuq Bhi, Toorani Bhi / Ahl-e-Chin Cheen Mein, Iran Mein Sasaani Bhi
Issi Maamoore Mein Aabad The Yoonani Bhi / Issi Dunya Mein Yahudi Bhi The, Nusraani Bhi
Par Tere Naam Pe Talwar Uthai Kis Ne / Baat Jo Bigri Huwi Thi, Woh Banaai Kis Ne
Kis Ne Thanda Kiya Atishkuda-e-Iran Ko? / Kis Ne Phir Zinda Kiya Tazkara-e-Yazdaan Ko?
Kon Si Qoum Faqat Teri Talabgar Huwi / Aur Tere Liye Zehmat Kash-e-Paikaar Huwi
Kis Ki Shamsheer Jahangeer, Jahandar Huwi / Kis Ki Takbeer Se Dunya Teri Baidar Huwi
Kis Ki Haibat Se Sanam Sehme Huwe Rehte The / Munh Ke Bal Gir Ke 'HU WA-ALLAH HU AHAD' Kehte The
Aa Gaya Ain Laraai Mein Agar Waqt-e-Namaz / Qibla Ru Ho Ke Zameen Bos Huwi Qoum-e-Hijaz
Ek Hi Saf Mein Khare Ho Gaye Mahmood-o-Ayaz / Na Koi Banda Raha Aur Na Koi Banda Nawaz
Banda-o-Sahib-o-Mauhtaaj-o-Ghani Aik Huwe / Teri Sarkar Mein Pohanche To Sabhi Aik Huwe
The Hameen Ek Tire Maarka Aaraaon Mein! / Khushkion Mein Kabhi Larte, Kabhi Dariyaon Mein,
Deen Azaanen Kabhi Europe Ke Kaleesaaon Mein / Kabhi Africa Ke Tapte Huwe Sehraaon Mein.
Shan Ankhon Mein Na Jachti Thi Jahan Daron Ki / Kalima Parhte The Hum Chaon Mein Talwaron Ki
Hum Jo Jeete The To Jnagon Ki Musibat Ke Liye / Aur Merte The Tere Naam Ki Azmat Ke Liye
Thi Na Kuch Taeg-Zani Apni Hukumat Ke Liye / Sar-Bakaf Phirte The Kya Dehar Mein Doulat Ke Liye
Qaum Apni Jo Zar-o-Maal-e-Jahan Par Marti / But Faroshi Ke Iwaz But Shikni Kyon Karti?
Tal Na Sakte The Agar Jang Mein Arh Jate The / Paon Sheron Ke Bhi Maidan Se Ukhar Jate The
Tujh Se Sarkash Huwa Koi To Bighar Jate The / Taeg Kya Cheez Hai, Hum Toup Se Larh Jate The
Ab Woh Altaf Nahin, Hum Pe Anayat Nahin / Baat Ye Kya Hai Ke Pehli Si Madarat Nahin
Kyun Musalmanon Mein Hai Doulat-e-Dunya Nayaab / Teri Qudrat To Hai Woh Jis Ki Na Had Hai Na Hisab
Tu Jo Chahe To Uthe Seena-e-Sehra Se Habab / Rahroo-e-Dasht Ho Seeli Zada Mouj-e-Saraab
Taan-e-Aghiyaar Hai, Ruswai Hai, Nadaari Hai, / Kya Tere Nam Pe Marne Ka Iwaz Khwari Hai?
Bani Aghyar Ki Ab Chahne Wali Dunya / Reh Gyi Apne Liye Aik Khiyali Dunya
Hum To Rukhsat Huwe, Auron Ne Sanbhali Dunya / Phir Na Kehna Huwi Touheed Se Khali Dunya
Ishq Ki Khair, Who Pehli Si Ada Bhi Na Sahi / Jaada Paimaai Taslim-o-Raza Bhi Na Sahi,
Kabhi Hum Se, Kabhi Ghairon Se Shanasaai Hai / Baat Kehne Ki Nahin, Tu Bhi To Harjaai Hai
Sar-e-Faran Pe Kiya Deen Ko Kamil Tu Ne / Ek Ishare Mein Hazaron Ke Liye Dil Tu Ne
Atish Andoz Kiya Ishq Ka Hasil Tu Ne / Phoonk Di Garmi-e-Rukhsar Se Mehfil Tu Ne
Aaj Kyun Seene Humare Sharar Abad Nahin / Hum Wohi Sokhta Saman Hain, Tuhe Yaad Nahin?
Wadi-e-Najd Mein Woh Shor-e-Silasil Na Raha / Qais Diwana-e-Nazara Mehmil Na Raha
Hosle Woh Na Rahe, Hum Na Rahe, Dil Na Raha / Ghar Ye Ujhra Hai Ke Tu Ronaq-e-Mehfil Na Raha
Ae Khush Aan Roz Ke Ayi-o-Bsad Naz Ayi / Be-Hijabana Soo'ay Mehfil-e-Ma Baaz Ayi
Chaak Iss Bulbul-e-Tanha Ki Nawa Se Dil Hon / Jaagne Wale Issi Bang-e-Dara Se Dil Hon
Yani Phir Zinda Naye Ehd-e-Wafa Se Dil Hon / Phir Issi Bada-e-Deerina Ke Pyaase Dil Hon
Daleel-E-Subah-E-Roshan Hai Sitaron Ki Tunak Tabi / Ufaq Se Aftab Ubhra, Gya Dour-E-Garan Khawabi
Urooq-E-Murda’ay Mashriq Mein Khoon-E-Zindagi Dora / Samajh Sakte Nahin Iss Raaz Ko Seena-O-Farabi
Musalman Ko Musalman Kar Diya Toofan-E-Maghrib Ne / Talatum Haye Darya Hi Se Hai Gohar Ki Seerabi
Atta Momin Ko Phir Dargah-E-Haq Se Hone Wala Hai / Shikoh-E-Turkamani, Zehan-E-Hindi, Nutq-E-Arabi
Asar Kuch Khawab Ka Ghunchon Mein Baqi Hai To Ae Bulbul ! / "Nawa Ra Talakh Tar Mee Zan Choo Zauq-E-Nagma Kmyabi"
Tarap Sehan-E-Chaman Mein, Ashiyan Mein, Shakhsaron Mein / Juda Pare Se Ho Sakti Nahin Taqdeer-E-Seemabi
Woh Chashm-E-Paak Been Kyun Zeenat-E-Bargistawan Dekhe / Nazar Ati Hai Jis Ko Mard-E-Ghazi Ki Jigar Tabi
Zameer-E-Lala Mein Roshan Charagh-E-Arzoo Kar De / Chaman Ke Zarre Zarre Ko Shaheed-E-Justujoo Kar De
Sar Shak-E-Chashm-E-Muslim Mein Hai Neesan Ka Asar Paida / Khalil-Allah (A.S.) Ke Darya Mein Hon Ge Phir Guhar Paida
Kitab-E-Millat-E-Baiza Ki Phir Sheeraza Bandi Hai / Ye Shakh-E-Hashmi Karne Ko Hai Phir Barg-E-Bar Paida
Rubood Aan Turk Sheerazi Dil-E-Tabraiz-O-Kabil Ra / Saba Karti Hai Buay Gul Se Apna Hamsafar Paida
Agar Usmaniyon Par Koh-E-Gham Toota To Kya Gham Hai / Ke Khoon-E-Sad Hazar Anjum Se Hoti Hai Sahar Paida
Jahan Baani Se Hai Dushwar Tar Kar-E-Jahan Beeni / Jigar Khoon Ho To Chashm-E-Dil Mein Hoti Hai Nazar Paida
Hazaron Saal Nargis Apni Benoori Pe Roti Hai / Bari Mushkil Se Hota Hai Chaman Mein Didahwar Paida
Nawa Pera Ho Ae Bulbul Ke Ho Tere Taranum Se / Kabootar Ke Tan-E-Nazuk Mein Shaheen Ka Jigar Paida
Tere Seene Mein Hai Poshida Raaz-E-Zindagi Keh De / Musalman Se Hadees-E-Soz-O-Saaz-E-Zindagi Keh De
Khuda’ay Lam Yazil Ka Dast-E-Qudrat Tu, Zuban Tu Hai / Yaqeen Paida Kar Ae Ghafil Ke Maghloob-E-Guman Tu Hai
Pare Hai Charakh-E-Neeli Faam Se Manzil Musalman Ki / Sitare Jis Ki Gard-E-Rah Hon, Woh Karwan Tu Hai
Makan Fani, Makeen Ani, Azal, Tera, Abad Tera / Khuda Ka Akhiri Pegham Hai Tu, Javidan Tu Hai
Hina Band-E-Uroos-E-Lala Hai Khoon-E-Jigar Tera / Teri Nisbat Baraheemi Hai, Mamaar-E-Jahan Tu Hai
Teri Fitrat Ameen Hai Mumkanat-E-Zindagani Ki / Jahan Ke Johar-E-Muzmar Ka Goya Imtihan Tu Hai
Miyan-E-Shakhsaran Sohbat-E-Murgh-E-Chaman Kab Talak! / Tere Bazu Mein Hai Parwaz-E-Shaheen-E-Kehsatani
Guman Abad-E-Hasti Mein Yaqeen Mard-E-Musalman Ka / Byaban Ki Shab-E-Tareek Mein Qindeel-E-Rahbani
Mitaya Qaisar-E-Kasra Ke Istabdad Ko Jis Ne / Woh Kya Tha, Zor-E-Haider (R.A.), Faqr-E-Bu Zar (R.A.), Sidq-E-Salmani (R.A.)
Huway Ahrar-E-Millat Jadah Pema Kis Tajamul Se / Tamashayi Shagaaf-E-Dar Se Hain Sadiyon Ke Zindani
Sabat-E-Zindagi Aeeman-E-Muhkam Se Hai Dunya Mein / Kah Almani Se Bhi Paenda Tar Nikla Hai Toorani
Jab Iss Angara’ay Khaki Mein Hota Hai Yaqeen Paida / To Kar Leta Hai Ye Bal-O-Par-E-Rooh-ul-Ameen Paida
Ghulami Mein Na Kaam Ati Hain Shamsheerain Na Tadbeerain / Jo Ho Zauq-E-Yaqeen Paida To Kat Jati Hain Zanjeerain
Koi Andaza Kar Sakta Hai Uss Ke Zor-E-Bazu Ka ! / Nigah-E-Mard-E-Momin Se Badal Jati Hain Taqdeerain
Tu Raaz-E-Kun Fakan Hai, Apni Ankhon Par Ayan Ho Ja / Khudi Ka Raazdan Ho Ja, Khuda Ka Tarjuman Ho Ja
Hawas Ne Kar Diya Tukre Tukre Nu-E-Insan Ko / Akhuwat Ka Byan Ho Ja, Mohabbat Ki Zuban Ho Ja
Ye Hindi, Who Khurasani, Ye Afghani, Who Toorani / Tu Ae Sharminda-E-Sahil ! Uchal Kar Be-Karan Ho Ja
Ghubar Aludah’ay Rang-O-Nasb Hain Baal-O-Par Tere / Tu Ae Murgh-E-Hara ! Urne Se Pehle Par-Fishan Ho Ja
Khudi Mein Doob Ja Ghafil ! Ye Sir-E-Zindagani Hai / Nikl Kar Halqa-E-Shaam-O-Sahar Se Javidan Ho Ja
Amal Se Zindagi Banti Hai Jannat Bhi, Jahanum Bhi / Ye Khaki Apni Fitrat Mein Na Noori Hai Na Naari Hai
Kharosh Amoz-E-Bulbul Ho, Girah Ghunche Ki Wa Kar De / Ke Tu Iss Gulistan Ke Waste Baad-E-Bahari Hai
Phir Uthi Asia Ke Dil Se Chankari Mohabbat Ki / Zameen Joulan Geh-E-Atlas Qabayan-E-Tatari Hai
Baya Paida Khareedarst Jaan-E-Natoowane Ra / "Pas Az Muddat Gudaz Aftaad Barma Karwame Ra"
Baya Saqi Nawaye Murgh-E-Zaar Az Shakhsar Amad / Bahar Amad Nigar Amad, Nigar Amad Qirar Amad
Kasheed Abar-E-Bahari Khemah Andar Wai-O-Sehra / Sada’ay Absharan Az Faraz-E-Kohsar Amad
Sarat Gardam To Ham Qanoon-E-Paisheen Saazdah Saqi / Ke Kheel-E-Naghma Pardazan Qitar Andar Qitar Amad
Kanar Az Zahadan Bargeer-O-Bebakana Saghar Kash / Pas Az Muddar Azeen Shakh-E-Kuhan Bang-E-Hazar Amad
Ba Mushtaqan Hadees-E-Khawajah (S.A.W.)-E-Badar-O-Hunain Awar / Tasarraf Haye Pinhanash Ba-Chashm Ashkar Amad
Dgar Shakh-E-Khalil (A.S.) Az Khoon-E-Ma Namnaak Mee Gardad / Babazaar-E-Mohabbat Naqad-E-Maa Kamil Ayar Amad
Khudi Ka Zikr Bahut Hua, Hum Ne Dil Ki Baat Bhi Sun Li / Bulandi Theek, Magar Thoda Sa Saya Bhi Zaroori Tha
Amal Ka Dars To Yaad Raha, Magar Yeh Baat Bhi Dil Mein Thi / Har Ek Safar Mein Thak Kar Baithna Bhi Koi Haar Nahin
Nigah Ko Door Talak Le Ja, Yeh Baat Hamein Bhi Achhi Lagi / Magar Jo Ghaas Hansi Rah Mein, To Dil Wahan Bhi Thehar Gaya
Sitaron Tak Bhi Soch Chali, Yeh Josh Bura To Tha Hi Nahin / Magar Zameen Ki Narm Hawa Ne Aaj Hamein Rok Liya
Khudi Ko Hum Ne Pukara Tha, Jawab Aaya Bade Pyar Se / Buland Ho, Magar Itna Nahin Ke Saya Nazar Na Aaye
Safar Ka Shauq Bhi Dil Mein Tha, Sukoon Ka Rang Bhi Dil Mein Tha / Pahaar Door Se Achhe The, Qareeb Aaya To Maidan Bhaya
Jahan Ne Kaha Ke Chal Uth Kar, Hum Ne Bhi Sar Utha Kar Kaha / Chalein Ge, Lekin Rah Mein Jo Ped Mile To Baithenge
Faqr Ka Naam Bada Pyara, Jalal Ki Baat Bhi Khoob Sahi / Magar Jo Chadar-e-Saya Mili, To Dil Ne Shukr Ada Kar Diya
Parwaz Ka Zikr Aaya To Hum Ne Khamoshi Se Muskura Kar / Kaha Ke Urna Theek, Magar Kabhi Dasht Bhi Dekh Liya Kar
Khudi Agar Hai To Us Mein Bhi Zara Narm Sa Pehlu Ho / Jo Apne Dil Ko Halka Rakhe, Wohi Safar Ko Aasan Kare
Amal Se Roshni Hoti Hai, Is Qaul Se Inkar Nahin / Magar Kabhi Sukoot Ki Lau Bhi Andar Andar Jalti Hai
Nigah Buland Ho Achhi Baat, Magar Dil Itna Sakht Na Ho / Ke Ghaas Ki Halki Khushbu Bhi Tujh Se Baat Na Kar Sake
Safar Mein Josh Bahut Dekha, Magar Yeh Baat Samajh Mein Aayi / Jo Narm Qadam Se Chalta Hai, Woh Door Talak Bhi Jata Hai
Sitaron Se Bhi Aage Ja, Yeh Khwab Hamein Bhi Pyara Tha / Magar Jo Raat Ko Saya Mila, To Khwab Wahin Meetha Ho Gaya
Khudi Ka Rang Ujala Tha, Magar Us Mein Thodi Chhaon Bhi Thi / Wohi Hamein Sab Se Achha Laga, Wohi Dil Ko Aasan Laga
Jigar Mein Aag Bhi Kam Na Thi, Magar Mizaj Narm Raha / Hum Ne To Dasht Mein Chal Kar Bhi Ghaas Ko Yaad Rakha
Jahan Ki Jeet Ka Zikr Hua, To Dil Ne Aahista Yeh Kaha / Pehle Apne Hisse Ka Pur-Sukoon Kona Dhoond To Le
Amal Ki Raah Mein Nikle To Rah Ne Kitni Baaten Ki / Har Mor Pe Ek Saya Tha, Har Saya Jaise Dost Koi
Nigah Mein Khwab Bade The, Magar Dil Mein Ek Narmi Thi / Hum Aasman Ko Dekhte The, Par Pair Zameen Par Rakhte The
Khudi Se Kehna Aahista, Woh Jaldi Jaldi Thak Jati Hai / Use Bhi Kabhi Hari Ghaas Par Chup Chaap Baithne Do
Sukoot Ko Kam Na Samjho Tum, Is Mein Bhi Ek Aahang Hai / Kabhi Jo Dil Thoda Ruk Jaye, To Rah Bhi Saaf Nazar Aaye
Parwaz Ki Baaten Theek, Magar Yeh Raaz Bhi Samjho Dost / Har Par Ka Apna Aaram Hai, Har Aasman Ka Apna Bojh
Faqr Mein Hum Ne Yeh Dekha Hai, Jeb Khali Ho To Kya Gham / Agar Kisi Ped Tale Do Pal Ka Sukoon Naseeb Aa Jaye
Nigah Ka Kaam Hai Door Dekhna, Dil Ka Kaam Hai Rah Chunana / Kabhi Sitara Bulata Hai, Kabhi Sabza Rok Leta Hai
Khudi Ko Kar To Buland Sahi, Magar Zyada Shor Kaisa / Jo Phool Khamosh Khile, Un Mein Bhi To Rang Bahut Hota Hai
Safar Mein Rahat Kam Sahi, Magar Bilkul Na Ho Yeh Kyon / Musafir Hi To Thoda Sa Apna Bistar Saath Liye Chalta Hai
Jahan Ki Bheed Se Guzre To Dil Ne Bas Itna Keh Dala / Har Jeet Se Pehle Aadmi Ko Apna Saaya Chahiye
Amal Ki Dhun Mein Jo Nikle The, Woh Baat Hamein Bhi Yaad Rahi / Magar Jo Dhoop Zyada Hui, To Hum Ne Saya Chun Liya
Sitaron Wali Baaten Bhi Hain, Maidan Ki Khushbu Bhi Apni / Dil Dono Se Banta Hai, Sirf Aag Se Kam Chalti Hai
Nigah Agar Upar Uthi Hai To Dil Ko Neeche Rehne Do / Kayi Dafa Hari Zameen Hi Insan Ko Bachati Hai
Khudi Ka Raz Yeh Nikla, Har Waqt Garajna Lazim Nahin / Kabhi Halki Si Muskahat Se Bhi Rah Ban Jati Hai
Safar Ka Shor Bahut Kam Ho To Dil Ki Chal Sunai De / Wohi Qadam Bada Sacha Hai Jo Dheere Dheere Padta Hai
Parwaz Ka Khwab Apni Jagah, Magar Yeh Baat Bhi Suniye / Jo Pair Thak Gaye Hon Un Ko Ghaas Ki Narmi Yaad Rahe
Jigar Ki Aag Ko Rakho, Magar Use Khaak Mat Kar Do / Thoda Sa Noor Tab Banta Hai Jab Saath Thandi Hawa Ho
Khudi Bhi Ek Narm Si Cheez, Amal Bhi Ek Meethi Zid / Jo Baat Pyar Se Samjhe, Wahi Dil Par Asar Karti Hai
Nigah Mein Dasht Ho Ya Koh, Dil Apna Rah Nikal Leta / Kahin Sitara Hansa Thoda, Kahin Saya Bula Leta
Faqr Ne Hum Ko Yeh Sikhaya, Kam Mein Bhi Kafi Cheezen Hain / Ek Chadar, Thodi Dhoop, Thoda Sabza, Aur Dil Ka Chain
Jahan Ko Jeetna Door Raha, Hum Ne To Itna Kaam Kiya / Jo Dil Udas Tha Shaam Talak, Us Ko Zara Behlaya Hai
Amal Ka Zor Zaroori Hai, Magar Har Waqt Nahin Hota / Kabhi Jo Rah Thakaye Bahut, To Theharna Bhi Hunar Hai
Khudi Se Hum Ne Kaha Uth, Woh Boli Thoda Sabr Bhi Kar / Jo Kaam Sukoon Se Hota Hai, Woh Daud Se Kab Hota Hai
Nigah-e-Shauq Ko Hum Ne Bhi Kai Bar Aazmaya Hai / Magar Jo Ped Ke Neeche Hawa Chali, To Dil Maan Gaya
Sitaron Ka Safar Achha, Magar Raat Lambi Hoti Hai / Kisi Qareeb Ki Halki Si Baat Zyada Garam Rakhti Hai
Safar Mein Jo Bhi Mila Hum Ko, Us Mein Thoda Ghar Bhi Tha / Koi Rah, Koi Ped, Koi Ghaas, Koi Chup Si Muskurahat
Khudi Ka Naam Sunte Hi Agar Dil Aur Sakht Ho Jaye / To Phir Wahan Se Mod Le Rah, Wahan Narmi Nahin Hogi
Amal Agar Hai To Achha Hai, Magar Dil Behalna Bhi To Ho / Har Kaam Ke Darmiyan Thoda Sa Aasman Dekh Liya Kar
Nigah Ne Koh Ko Dekha Tha, Dil Ko Chaman Pasand Aaya / Hum Is Mein Kya Gunah Karen, Mizaj Apna Zameeni Tha
Faqr Ka Zauq Bhi Hum Mein Tha, Magar Aisi Faqr Se Kya / Jo Aadmi Se Hansi Cheen Le, Ya Saya Bhi Door Kare
Khudi Ki Baat Karne Walon, Thoda Dil Ka Haal Bhi Poochho / Kabhi Bulandi Bojh Banti Hai, Kabhi Aaram Dua Lagta Hai
Parwaz Ka Dars Sun Kar Bhi Hum Ne Pair Samhale Rakhe / Kya Khabar Rah Mein Narm Zameen Ka Dil Par Kya Asar Ho
Jahan Mein Rehne Ka Fan Shayad Itna Sa Hi Hai Aakhir / Na Har Dam Jeet Ka Nasha, Na Har Lamha Haar Ka Gham
Amal Ke Sath Agar Thoda Sukoon Bhi Ghar Kar Jaye / To Aadmi Ki Baat Mein Kuchh Aur Mithas Aati Hai
Khudi Ko Hum Ne Samjha Hai Koi Naazuk Si Mehman / Use Dhoop Mein Mat Rakho, Zara Saya Bhi Milne Do
Nigah Buland Thi Achhi, Magar Jab Dil Udas Nikla / To Hum Ne Door Sitare Chhor Kar Paas Ka Ped Dekha
Safar Ki Rah Mein Hum Ne Bahut Aawazen Suni Hongi / Sab Se Meethi Wohi Nikli Jo Chup Se Dil Ko Samjhaye
Sitaron Wali Rahon Mein Badi Thand Si Rehti Hai / Koi Maidan Agar Garam Ho To Dil Udhar Bhi Jata Hai
Khudi Ka Faisla Mushkil, Amal Ka Rasta Bhi Sakht / Magar Hari Si Ghaas Pe Baith Kar Kayi Guthi Sulajhti Hai
Jigar Mein Josh Rehne Do, Magar Itna Bhi Kyon Yaro / Ke Ek Patte Ki Halki Si Hansi Sunai Hi Na De
Faqr Ka Husn Tab Aaya Jab Bojh Thoda Kam Nikla / Do Roti, Ek Khuli Rah, Aur Sham Ka Aram Kafi Tha
Nigah Ko Door Le Ja Kar Bhi Dil Ko Paas Rakha Hum Ne / Wahi Ada Hamare Kaam Aayi, Wahi Rah Aasan Thi
Khudi Ka Dars Woh Kya De Jo Muskurana Bhool Gaya / Hamein To Woh Ustad Bhaya Jo Rah Mein Thehar Bhi Jaye
Amal Ki Baat Sahi Lekin Hawa Se Dosti Bhi Ho / Wagarna Aadmi Chalta Rahe Aur Dil Dhool Ban Jaye
Parwaz Se Inkar Nahin, Bas Itna Kehna Hai Dil Ka / Har Unchi Baat Ke Neeche Ek Narm Jagah Bhi Rehne Do
Safar Agar Hai To Is Mein Thoda Khwab Bhi Bachne Do / Jo Sirf Manzil Sochta Hai, Rah Ka Husn Kho Deta Hai
Khudi Ka Rang Tab Nikla Jab Shor Zara Sa Kam Nikla / Chup Reh Kar Apne Aap Se Milna Bhi Badi Baat Hoti Hai
Nigah Ko Door Tak Bhej Kar Hum Dil Ke Pas Laut Aaye / Wahan Sitare Kam The Lekin Chain Bahut Zyada Tha
Jahan Ki Daud Dekh Kar Dil Ne Aahista Se Bas Kaha / Thoda Kam Jeetna Bhi Shayed Zyada Jeene Jaisa Hai
Faqr Mein Bhi Ek Narmi Ho To Baat Kahan Se Kahan Jaye / Sakhti Se Sirf Dhoop Mile, Chhaon Se Dil Khilta Hai
Amal Ki Rah Mein Hum Ko Kai Bar Mod Aisa Mila / Jahan Rukna Hi Jeet Tha Aur Chalna Bilkul Lazim Na Tha
Khudi Agar Hai To Us Ko Bhi Hansi Aani Chahiye / Har Waqt Garam Rehne Se To Aadmi Patthar Ho Jata Hai
Sitaron Ka Khayal Achha, Magar Yeh Bhi Ghalat Kya Hai / Ke Sham Ko Ghar Lautte Waqt Koi Ped Yaad Aaye
Safar Ka Zor Apni Jagah, Magar Thoda Sukoon Bhi Rakh / Musafir Wohi Hoshyar Jo Rah Mein Saans Le Sake
Nigah Aur Dil Ki Banti Ho To Baat Banti Hai / Sirf Aankh Upar Ho To Pair Rah Bhool Jate Hain
Khudi Se Hum Ne Yeh Seekha Ke Apna Rang Na Kho Baith / Magar Dil Ne Yeh Samjhaya Ke Narmi Bhi Zaroori Hai
Amal Ka Dhoom Se Karna Har Kaam Ka Tariqa Nahin / Kabhi Halki Chaal Se Bhi Doori Tay Ho Jati Hai
Parwaz Ki Dhun Mein Aksar Log Zameen Bhool Jate Hain / Hamein Hari Jagah Dekh Kar Apna Waqt Yaad Aata Hai
Faqr Agar Dil Ko Halka Kar De To Baat Khoob Hai Dost / Agar Hansi Hi Cheen Le To Phir Aisa Faqr Kaisa
Nigah Mein Noor Ho Lekin Dil Mein Saya Bhi Rehne De / Har Roshan Baat Ka Aakhir Koi Aaram Bhi Hota Hai
Khudi Ka Naam Liya To Dil Ne Pyar Se Itna Hi Kaha / Thoda Kam Farman Chala, Thoda Khud Ko Sunta Chal
Jahan Mein Ahd-e-Amal Theek, Magar Itni Bhi Jaldi Kya / Ke Jo Phool Rah Mein Khile The Un Par Nazar Hi Na Gayi
Sitaron Tak Ki Rahon Mein Jo Dil Bahut Aage Nikal Gaya / Use Kabhi Kabhi Mud Kar Ghaas Ki Narmi Dekhni Chahiye
Safar Se Dosti Hum Ko, Magar Ghar Se Mohabbat Bhi / Musafir Wohi Sacha Hai Jo Laut Kar Bhi Muskaye
Nigah Ne Jis Ko Koh Kaha, Dil Ne Use Bas Rah Kaha / Aur Rah Mein Jo Saya Mila, Wahi Sab Se Bada Inaam Tha
Amal Ke Sath Agar Thodi Shararat Aa Jaye To Kya Gham / Har Kaam Ko Bohat Sanjeeda Karna Bhi To Zaroori Nahin
Khudi Ka Raz Shayad Yeh Nahin Ke Har Dam Aag Ban Jao / Kabhi Mitti Sa Thanda Reh Kar Bhi Aadmi Pur-Noor Rehta Hai
Faqr Mein Hum Ne Chain Talash Kiya, Mil Gaya Dheere Se / Ek Purani Chadar, Ek Hawa, Aur Dil Ka Halka Ho Jana
Parwaz Ka Zikr Sun Kar Bhi Hum Ne Rah Ko Chuma Tha / Hamein Bulandi Se Zyada Kabhi Safar Pyara Lagta Hai
Jahan Ka Bojh Uthane Se Pehle Itna Soch Liya Kar / Kya Apne Dil Ke Kamre Mein Thodi Jagah Bachi Bhi Hai
Nigah Agar Sitara Mange To Dil Ko Gul Bhi Manga De / Wahi Aadmi Poora Hai Jo Dono Hath Khali Na Rakhe
Amal Ka Shor Kam Kiya To Kaam Aur Behtar Ho Baitha / Kuchh Batein Dheemi Chaal Mein Zyada Dur Nikalti Hain
Khudi Ki Raah Mein Aksar Hum Apna Dil Bhula Baithe / Phir Ek Ped Ki Chhaon Ne Sabak Naya Suna Dala
Safar Ka Husn Manzil Se Kayi Bar Kam Nahin Hota / Jo Rah Mein Thehar Kar Dekhe, Us Par Baat Khul Jati Hai
Sitaron Se Hamein Nisbat, Magar Sabza Se Bhi Ulfat / Hum Aise Dil Ko Kya Kahen Jo Dono Taraf Chala Jaye
Nigah-e-Shauq Agar Tez Ho To Dil Ko Narm Rakho Tum / Tez Dhoop Mein Narm Hawa Ka Sath Bahut Kaam Aata Hai
Faqr Ka Maqsad Agar Bas Dil Ko Azad Karna Hai / To Phir Thoda Hansa Kar Ji, Thoda Halka Ho Kar Chal
Khudi Ko Har Ghadi Maidan Mein Lalkarna Kya Zaroori / Kabhi Use Chup Rahne Do, Kabhi Use Sonay Do
Amal Ki Raat Lambi Thi, Magar Subh Aaram Se Aayi / Jo Jaldi Jaldi Jalte The, Woh Thak Kar So Gaye Aakhir
Parwaz Ka Junoon Achha, Magar Is Dil Ka Kya Kijye / Use Har Unchi Baat Ke Sath Thoda Neecha Saya Chahiye
Safar Mein Ek Ajab Baat Thi, Jitna Chale Utna Samjhe / Kayi Manzilen Bas Us Lamhe Mein Thin Jab Hum Ruke Thode
Jahan Ko Badalna Mushkil Tha, Hum Ne Mizaj Badal Dala / Ab Dhoop Bhi Khaas Na Rahi, Saya Bhi Zyada Pyara Tha
Nigah Ka Noor Tab Utra Jab Dil Thoda Naram Hua / Sakht Aankhon Se Aksar Rah Ka Husn Chhup Jata Hai
Khudi Ka Dars Bahut Ooncha, Magar Hum Chhote Log Thahre / Hamein To Roz Ki Rah Mein Thoda Chain Bhi Chahiye Tha
Amal Ko Hum Ne Pooja Nahin, Bas Dost Bana Kar Rakha / Jitna Saath Chala Achha, Jahan Thaka Wahan Ruk Gaya
Faqr Agar Muskura De To Roti Bhi Dawat Lagti Hai / Aur Sakhti Se Bhar Jaye To Dastarkhwan Bhi Soona Hai
Sitaron Ka Safar Baad Mein, Pehle Dil Ko Raah Mile / Jo Apna Aangan Kho Baithe Woh Aasman Kya Jeetenge
Safar Ka Zakhm Bhi Dekha, Safar Ka Lutf Bhi Dekha / Magar Sab Se Meetha Waqt Woh Tha Jab Dhoop Halki Thi
Nigah Ko Hum Ne Sikhaya Ke Har Cheez Mein Jung Na Dekh / Kabhi Kisi Patte Par Bhi Reham Ka Rang Sajta Hai
Khudi Se Bas Itni Darkhwast, Zara Kam Hukum Chalaya Kar / Dil Apna Kaam Karega Agar Tu Narmi Se Bolegi
Amal Mein Garmahat Rakhna, Magar Jaldi Jaldi Nahin / Dheemi Aanch Pe Pakti Cheez Ka Zaiqa Aur Hota Hai
Parwaz Agar Naseeb Hui To Theek, Na Hui To Gham Kaisa / Kayi Dafa Khula Maidan Bhi Dil Ko Shahin Bana Deta Hai
Faqr Ka Sada Libas Tha, Dil Ka Mizaj Haseen Raha / Kam Cheezon Mein Bhi Hum Ne Kaisa Aaram Pa Liya
Nigah Mein Khwab Aur Dil Mein Chhaon, Yeh Jam Bada Khushrang / Isi Tarah To Rah Guzar Bhi Mehfil Jaisi Lagti Hai
Khudi Ka Rang Yaqeenan Khoob, Magar Thoda Halka Bhi / Har Waqt Sang-e-Koh Na Ban, Kabhi Mitti Sa Mulayam Ho
Safar Mein Sab Se Sacha Dost Aksar Koi Insan Na Tha / Koi Ped, Koi Hawa, Koi Khamosh Si Hari Jagah Thi
Sitaron Wali Baat Sun Kar Bhi Dil Ne Aaj Yeh Keh Dala / Jo Choti Khushi Na Samjhe Woh Bari Baat Kya Samjhega
Amal Ka Zor Tha Hum Par, Magar Dil Mein Yeh Dhoon Bhi Thi / Koi Pur-Saya Din Aaye To Kuchh Lamhe Bas Ji Lein
Faqr Mein Hum Ne Dekha Hai, Zaroorat Kam To Gham Kam / Aur Jab Gham Thoda Kam Ho To Dil Khud Noor Ban Jata Hai
Nigah Ne Rah Dikhayi Thi, Dil Ne Raftar Chuni Aakhir / Har Jeet Tez Nahin Hoti, Kuchh Jeet Dheemi Bhi Hoti Hai
Khudi Ka Naam Sun Kar Jo Dil Zara Sa Hans De Pyar Se / Samajh Lo Us Mein Zindagi Abhi Narm Aur Zinda Hai
Parwaz Se Pehle Aadmi Ko Saans Ka Fan Bhi Aana Chahiye / Jo Rah Mein Saans Na Le Sake Woh Aasman Kya Dekhega
Safar Se Hum Ko Ishq Sahi, Magar Itna Bhi Kya Yaro / Ke Ghar Ki Shaam Bhool Baithein Aur Ped Ki Chhaon Bhi
